testcase.name: test_suggest_items
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_quotation_builder.py:307: in test_suggest_items assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"AI suggestion failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.43628314999999984, Max budget: 0.401"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_extract_rfq_text
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_quotation_builder.py:336: in test_extract_rfq_text assert r.status_code == 200, f"{r.status_code} {r.text[:500]}" E AssertionError: 502 {"detail":"AI extraction failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.43628314999999984, Max budget: 0.401"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
